description: Final verification pass - ensure the rewritten LTX_PRO.py is syntactically valid, all referenced functions exist, no broken cross-references, and all key integration points work correctly.
steps: Step 1: Run AST parse on the final LTX_PRO.py to confirm no syntax errors

Step 2: Verify all class definitions are present: InlinePromptArchitect, InlineVisionDescribe, VRAMManager, AudioSyncEngine, PersistentLatentSeed, CharacterPromptAnchor, CharacterEmbeddingBank, SVIProContext, FlowState, InfiniteFlowConfig

Step 3: Verify all function definitions are present: generate_pro, generate_infinite_flow, run_storyboard, run_easy_prompt, run_vision_describe, decompose_script_to_scenes, blend_overlap_frames, cleanup_memory, aggressive_cleanup
Step 4: Fix any issues found in steps 1-3
acceptance_criteria: ast.parse() succeeds on the final file
All key classes and functions are defined
No undefined name references in function signatures
verification: Run: python -c "import ast; tree=ast.parse(open('/projects/sandbox/ltx/LTX_PRO.py').read()); print(f'PASS: {len([n for n in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(n, ast.ClassDef)])} classes, {len([n for n in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(n, ast.FunctionDef)])} functions defined')"
